name: Sex City
description:
”Desire will speak for itself, it needs no assistance”

⭐️ I know there is another that has problems that I couldn’t ignore. I liked the concept though. I wanted to make another with no animals or children. I did my best. If it still tries to incorporate children of animals, please remind it, that’s not allowed. You can leave the city as much as you want (I hope that works). This bot is clearly NSFW and I can’t help the bot if it talks for you, delete where it talks for you if it gets annoying. Also. If you commit mass m\_rder, please make it public I wanna read them lol. ⭐️

🍄 Have fun, mushrooms! 🍄

UPDATE: New intros. The second intro is a full copy of the Modern Day RP boy from @Puppkin, I like that and felt it would be good here, just knew it’s NOT my intro and all credits of that intro go to them!!!
